publicSecurity.title: Report a vulnerability to {org}
publicSecurity.subtitle: If you have found a security vulnerability in one of our products, we want to hear from you. We follow coordinated disclosure and commit to acknowledging valid reports within 72 hours.

form.title: Submit a report
form.description: All fields marked * are required. You may submit anonymously; we'll still investigate but can't reply.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What you found, how to reproduce it, potential impact.
form.anonymousNote: Submitting anonymously is fine — we just can't follow up with you.
form.submitFailed: Couldn't submit the report. Please email us instead.
form.captchaFailed: Couldn't confirm you're human. Reload the page and try again.
form.successDescription: Thank you for the responsible disclosure. If you left an email, we'll reach out within 72 hours.
